mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rate near zero suppresses risk-free rates, reducing discount rates and supporting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns following months with FEDFUNDS below 0.5% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment rate crosses above 8%, labor market deterioration triggers forced de-risking and margin compression fears, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter as earnings revisions follow with a lag.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns when UNRATE exceeds 8% are positive in more than 50% of triggered instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous contraction in retail sales and industrial production creates a reinforcing negative demand-supply loop that exceeds the predictive power of either series alone, forecasting negative 20-day equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term between RSAFS and INDPRO yields a rank correlation with SPX 20d returns below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a deep recession regime where housing starts are depressed, rising industrial production predicts positive short-term equity returns because it signals the manufacturing sector has bottomed.
regime_hint: deep recession with depressed housing activity
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns following positive INDPRO changes when HOUST is below 500 are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 0.25%, liquidity trap dynamics dominate and equity risk premiums compress as policy certainty increases, generating positive 60-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25% are negative in more than 40% of triggered months over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Declining real retail sales directly reduce corporate revenue forecasts and consumption-linked earnings, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Monthly changes in RSAFS show a rank correlation greater than -0.03 with SPX 20d returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The interaction between accelerating job losses and rising unemployment captures both the extensive and intensive margins of labor market distress, producing sharper negative 5-day equity returns than either variable alone.
failure_condition: The joint model of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to outperform the best single-variable model by at least 2 percentage points in directional accuracy over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL registers a 3-month change below 0.5% while FEDFUNDS sits below 0.5%, real policy rates turn deeply negative, repressing yields and forcing capital into risk assets, generating positive 60-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns during triggered episodes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.
